sow.objective: Design, build, and deploy a production-grade AWS e-commerce platform for 5,000 concurrent users with 1 million product catalog, real-time async inventory, Stripe payment processing, and 99.95% HA across 3 Availability Zones in ap-southeast-7 (Thailand) using AWS Landing Zone architecture.

in_scope: AWS Landing Zone setup (4 accounts: Management, Log Archive, Audit, Shared Services, Production)
VPC design: 3 AZs, 9 subnets (public/private app/private DB per AZ)
ECS on EC2 cluster with 6 m5.2xlarge nodes (2 per AZ)
Aurora PostgreSQL Multi-AZ (1 writer + 2 read replicas)
SQS queues for async inventory and order events
ALB with path-based routing across 3 AZs
S3 for static assets and product images
Security: KMS, Secrets Manager, VPC Flow Logs, CloudTrail, GuardDuty

deliverables.name: Architecture Design Document
deliverables.description: Full architecture specification including network design, service selection rationale, security controls, cost breakdown, and implementation roadmap

deliverables.name: Draw.io Architecture Diagram
deliverables.description: Production-grade Draw.io XML diagram with AWS Landing Zone, 3-AZ VPC, all services, and data flow arrows

deliverables.name: Landing Zone Configuration
deliverables.description: AWS Control Tower deployment with 4 accounts, SCPs, IAM Identity Center, Transit Gateway

deliverables.name: Infrastructure as Code (IaC)
deliverables.description: CloudFormation/Terraform templates for VPC, ECS cluster, Aurora, ElastiCache, OpenSearch, ALB, CloudFront, WAF, SQS

deliverables.name: Containerized Microservices
deliverables.description: 7 Docker container images deployed to ECR and running on ECS across 3 AZs

deliverables.name: CI/CD Pipeline
deliverables.description: CodePipeline + CodeBuild pipeline for automated build, test, and ECS deployment

deliverables.name: SOC 2 / CIS Compliance Checklist
deliverables.description: Completed compliance checklist mapping AWS controls to SOC 2 Type II and CIS AWS Foundations Benchmark

deliverables.name: Load Test Report
deliverables.description: Results of 5,000 concurrent user load test including p95/p99 latency, error rate, and auto-scaling behavior

deliverables.name: Operations Runbook
deliverables.description: Day-2 operations guide: scaling procedures, failover playbooks, backup/restore, incident response

phases.name: Design, Planning & Landing Zone
activities: Set up SCPs and IAM Identity Center

phases.name: Infrastructure Deployment
activities: Set up Secrets Manager and KMS

phases.name: Application Development & Deployment
activities: Build and push all 7 microservice Docker images
Configure ECS task definitions and services

phases.name: Testing, Hardening & Go-Live
activities: Load testing (5,000 concurrent users with k6)

budget.cost_optimization_target: Convert to Reserved Instances after 3 months to save ~35% (~$3,085/month)

acceptance_criteria: Architecture reviewed and approved by team
Landing Zone with 4 accounts fully operational
5,000 concurrent users load test passes with p95 response time < 500ms
All SOC 2 Type II and CIS AWS Foundations controls documented
1M products indexed and searchable in OpenSearch
Async inventory updates processed within 5 seconds via SQS
Monthly infrastructure cost confirmed within $20,000 budget
CI/CD pipeline deploys to ECS without manual intervention
All secrets stored in Secrets Manager (zero hardcoded credentials)
VPC Flow Logs, CloudTrail, and GuardDuty active in all accounts
assumptions: ap-southeast-7 region has Aurora, ElastiCache, OpenSearch, ECS, SQS available
Stripe account and API keys available before Week 8
Product catalog data (1M products) provided in CSV/JSON format before Week 9
Domain name registered and Route 53 hosted zone created
AWS accounts with appropriate limits (EC2, RDS, ElastiCache) pre-requested
No on-premises integration required for v1
